input.testCaseTitle: For change management workflow - Product manager can do the changes and approve/reject.
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-188 reported defect: For change management workflow - Product manager can do the changes and approve/reject.
input.errorMessage: For change management workflow - Product manager can do the changes and approve/reject.

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Product Manager did not have the expected change-management workflow actions to edit and approve/reject. The role-specific workflow capability was fixed and verified on the development server.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.72. Source detail is limited; code-bug is acceptable if the evaluator treats it as workflow action logic.
